source_name: Code4rena Reflector V3 Findings & Analysis Report (2025-10)
finding_title: set_invocation_costs_config() fails to authorize admin allowing anyone to set invocation costs
summary: Reflector V3 的 Soroban oracle 合约中，价格查询收费配置入口缺少管理员授权，任意用户可以修改 invocation cost 配置，破坏 oracle 查询费用和可用性假设。
root_cause: a public Soroban configuration entrypoint mutates oracle fee parameters without binding the call to the admin Address via require_auth
broken_invariants: only the configured admin may mutate oracle fee or invocation-cost configuration
public configuration entrypoints must authenticate the same authority whose state they change
attack_preconditions: 攻击者可以调用公开 Soroban entrypoint
配置变更会影响后续 oracle/beam 查询收费或调用可用性
attacker_capability: external Soroban user able to submit transactions with arbitrary config parameters
trigger_actions: set costs to values that overcharge, undercharge, or disrupt expected query economics

impact.description: attacker-controlled oracle cost configuration can disrupt consumers and fee accounting

why_not_higher: 保留 final report 的 High；是否构成直接资金损失取决于下游协议是否把该 oracle 作为清算/借贷安全边界。
why_not_lower: 未授权配置修改影响 oracle 费用与服务可用性，且无需管理员权限即可触发。
common_false_positive_angles: 确认当前 entrypoint 是否确实 public 且缺少 require_auth
确认被修改配置不是仅测试环境或不可达状态
若只有治理/管理员可调用，则应降级为配置风险
mitigations: 在所有配置 mutation entrypoint 中对 admin Address 执行 require_auth，并为非 admin 调用添加回归测试。
